div.span: Sign up creates an employee account. Administrator roles are assigned later.

label.style: font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-muted); display: block; margin-bottom: 4px; font-weight: 600;

div.span: assets overdue for return - action required

div.p: Organization Setup requires Administrator privileges. Please contact your system manager to request permissions.
Manage corporate units, categories, and user elevations

t.p: Note: Department lists configure data picklists dynamically across transfer forms.

div.p: Search, audit, and filter complete corporate inventory

input.placeholder: Search by tag, serial, or QR code...

div.p: Initiate asset custodian handovers and trace custody history

div.span: Occupied: Custody currently held by . Direct reallocation blocked. Complete transfer requests instead.

div.p: Select an asset from the list to display its chronological custodian records.
Reserve shared assets, meeting locations, and equipment items
Track routine repairs and technician statuses
Validate location placements and log damaged/missing assets

tr.td: No assets loaded for audit scan.

div.p: Visualize deployment counts and inspect lifecycle statistics

ul.li: Conference Room B2 – 24 bookings this month
Cargo Van AF-0112 – 27 allocations this month
Heavy Forklift AF-0057 – scheduled overhaul (5 days)
Intel Laptop AF-0020 – 4 years old : nearing deprecation

div.p: Chronological timeline of system executions and transfers

textarea.placeholder: Detail hardware fault, wear, or inspection reasons...
